description: Generate a new raster image from a text prompt via the GPT Image fallback CLI (image_gen.py generate).
rules: local-output only: writes an image + a request preview under record_store; never pushes to a remote
porter runs the CLI in --dry-run --no-augment so it validates the request and resolves output paths offline (no OPENAI_API_KEY, no network)
a real (non-dry-run) render requires OPENAI_API_KEY and the openai SDK; the porter degrades gracefully when they are absent
MODEL must be a GPT Image model (gpt-image-*); SIZE in {1024x1024,1536x1024,1024x1536,auto}; QUALITY in {low,medium,high,auto}; N in 1..10
usage: Set PROMPT (required). Optional: MODEL, SIZE, QUALITY, N. Output: generate.json (request preview / audit).
limitation: The vendored porter only previews the request (--dry-run). Producing real pixels needs OPENAI_API_KEY + the openai SDK and is not performed by this governed porter.

vars.PROMPT: a red ceramic cube on a white seamless background, studio lighting
